title: Use opacity for regression series in champion timeline charts
description: Update ScoreChampionVersionTimeline chart styling so regression dataset series use the same colors as feedback series and lower opacity instead of dashed lines. Update focused tests and run the ScoreChampionVersionTimeline test.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented frontend-only chart styling update. Regression timeline series now share feedback colors and use 0.45 opacity instead of dash styling in both combined and per-score ScoreChampionVersionTimeline charts. Updated focused tests. Validation passed: npm test -- ScoreChampionVersionTimeline.test.tsx --runInBand from dashboard. Task left in progress because changes are not committed/landed by request.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Follow-up after visual check: removed remaining accuracy-series dash styling too, so ScoreChampionVersionTimeline data lines no longer set strokeDasharray at all. Only CartesianGrid still uses dashed grid lines. Focused validation passed again: npm test -- ScoreChampionVersionTimeline.test.tsx --runInBand.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Tuned regression timeline opacity from 0.45 to 0.35 so regression dataset series are a little more transparent while keeping shared feedback colors and solid lines. Focused validation passed: npm test -- ScoreChampionVersionTimeline.test.tsx --runInBand.
